title: Infrared tech is decades old – why does almost every TV remote use it? - Engadget
summary: My remote defaulted back to using infrared to send signals. Ultimately, infrared may have stuck around to help with initial pairing and as a reliable fallback, but your TV's remote is likely using Bluetooth most of the time.
caption: output/2026-07-19/infrared-tech-is-decades-old-why-does-almost-every-tv-remote-use-it-en.txt
